creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #6)
> Thanks. Note: In cases where a port is currently unmaintained (ports@) *and*
> the change you're making "takes maintainership" by setting MAINTAINER to
> your (bugzilla) email address, feel free to set maintainer-approved (as
> implicit) if you have the permissions to do so.

Thanks for the information. I don't see the "maintainer-approv(ed/al)"
on this PR. Probably not required/necessary in this case. :)

Thanks again, Kubilay Kocak, for taking the time for this.

--Chris
